description_long: This is a fictional starfighter with a sleek, elongated fuselage and a distinctive set of four wings arranged in an X-shape, each equipped with a long laser cannon at the tip. The body is primarily metallic gray with red markings and weathered detailing, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. The cockpit is located near the front, enclosed with a transparent canopy and detailed with visible framing. Two large cylindrical engines are mounted on each side of the fuselage, for a total of four, with exhaust ports visible at the rear. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and a compact, angular design. The overall form is aerodynamic, with mechanical and sci-fi elements suggesting advanced technology and combat capability.
description: A metallic gray starfighter with four X-shaped wings, red markings, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. It features four cylindrical engines and a single vertical tail fin.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical X-shaped wing arrangement with laser cannons.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and the stacked engine configuration along with the wing-mounted cannons.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the four engine exhausts, vertical stabilizer, and the mechanical detailing of the tail section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the fuselage profile, cockpit, and wing structure with visible red markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with four straight wings arranged in an X-shape, each wing equipped with a long laser cannon at the tip; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines mounted in pairs on each side of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and no horizontal stabilizers extending beyond the wing structure.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear with main and nose gear units implied but not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and multi-panel window design.
